summary: Completed frontend-only e2e testing of the Select Traders Client Area scaffold. Validated every route, every data-testid referenced, all critical interactions (tab switching, spawn flow 4-phase modal, match page, create team dialog with validation, wallet withdraw KYC gate, sidebar logout, mobile drawer). All 21 features in the review request pass.

issues: Recharts emits warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on initial render. Cosmetic console noise; charts render correctly once visible. Consider wrapping ResponsiveContainer with minHeight/minWidth or rendering charts only when their tab is visible.

React warning: 'You provided a value prop to a form field without an onChange handler.' Likely the locked @username input uses value={...} without onChange. Use readOnly + defaultValue or add a noop onChange to silence the warning.

The hint text 'Capital split (sum must equal $100,000)' and 'Sum: $X / $Y' label remain in a red/error color even when the sum is valid (e.g., 33333+33333+33334=100000). Should switch to a success/green color (or neutral) when valid for better feedback.

action_items: (Optional) Fix Settings locked username input — switch from value to readOnly+defaultValue (or add noop onChange) to remove React warning.
(Optional) Eliminate Recharts width/height(-1) console warnings by setting explicit min dims or lazy-mounting charts inside inactive tab panes.
(Optional / minor UX) Toggle the 'Sum: $X / $Y' color to green when capital split matches total in Create Team dialog.

(Doc only) Reference listed 'sidebar-link-trade-duel-arena' but actual testids are kebab-cased from menu labels (e.g., 'sidebar-link-1v1-duel-centre'). Either update review-request docs or rename testids to match.
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes (verified 10 sidebar links, 6 settings tabs, all page-level testids, spawn-card-{size}, lobby-card-{id}, tournament-card-{id}, team-{id}, notif-{id}). Excellent test hygiene.
All flows are properly mocked (sonner toasts, spawn flow 4-phase setTimeout, Recharts simulated ticks). No backend calls were made — consistent with MVP scaffold scope.
Mobile responsiveness verified: desktop sidebar hidden on 375px width, hamburger toggle opens a separate drawer (Sheet-style) containing all 10 nav items + user/sign-out footer.
Sidebar logout correctly routes back to '/' landing page; spawn flow correctly redirects to '/app/match/4781' after ~8s through 4 phases (searching → paired → activating → starting).
test_credentials: Not required — no auth gates implemented yet. Mock user @TradeFury (PRO plan) is hardcoded in /app/frontend/src/lib/mockData.js.
seed_data_creation: None — all data sourced from mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Area scaffold at /app/* is fully functional with mocked data. Next iteration likely wires real backend (FastAPI). When backend integration begins: (1) replace mockData.js consumers with React Query hooks pointing to /api/* (process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL), (2) the spawn flow's setTimeout chain will need to become real matchmaking calls, (3) wallet/KYC/team-create stubs become real POSTs. All data-testids are stable — reuse the playwright selectors used here. Note: the reference doc mentions 'sidebar-link-trade-duel-arena' but actual testid is 'sidebar-link-1v1-duel-centre' (kebab-cased label). Use the runtime testids listed in this report's critical_code_review_comments.
